{{Infobox character
| name = Jai Sen
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Soulsmith (novel)|Soulsmith]]
}}

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Sen]] is a member of the [[Jai clan]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Sen]] is a spearman.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c6">''Soulsmith'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Sen]] has reached the threshold of [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Sen]] told a story about a spear.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8">''Soulsmith'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|“I am Jai Sen, of the Jai clan whose honor echoes in every corner of the Blackflame Empire.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
